══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Astral Elf — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:20+9=29 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Astral Elf — Iron Concentration (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Astral Elf — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:3+9=12 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Astral Elf — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Astral Elf — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Astral Elf — Iron Concentration. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Astral Elf — Iron Concentration.
→ Astral Elf — Iron Concentration: CON save [d20:16+8=24 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 17 necrotic damage (half).
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):17+8=25 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 5 ══
